content: This guide covers the standard equipment inspection process for Cedar Ridge. All equipment must be inspected at least once per quarter.
Shinai: Check for cracks, splinters, loose tsukagawa. Flex test each slat.
Kote: Inspect palmar stitching, check padding compression, verify kote-himo ties.
Bogu: Check men-gane for cracks, verify do straps, inspect tare for fraying.
IMPORTANT: Any damaged equipment must be immediately removed from active inventory and tagged with a red damage tag.
Purchases under $175 may be approved by either co-owner independently. Purchases at or above $175 require explicit approval from both co-owners before ordering.
Minimum requirements: 10 adult shinai, 5 adult kote pairs, 6 adult bogu sets. See file_01.pdf for full specification.
